name: Salvage Beetle
reasoning: V2 best balances prompt adherence with clean anatomy and card readability. It features a stocky beetle with proper segmented legs, iridescent green-bronze coloring with rust/orange patina, curved antennae, and sits naturally on weathered metal debris. V1 is overly photorealistic and too shiny/polished, losing the post-apocalyptic worn aesthetic. V3 has anatomical issues—the legs appear too spiky/mechanical and lack proper segmentation, and the overall design feels more steampunk than naturalist.

artifacts_found.issue: Overly photorealistic rendering with excessive glossiness; lacks the stylized digital illustration quality and post-apocalyptic weathered feel requested
Legs appear over-spiked and lack proper segmented beetle anatomy; design skews too heavily steampunk/mechanical rather than naturalist
